hypothesis: Systems-optimizer recovery becomes safer if runner-stability cards can treat `node CLAW/scripts/run-site-script.mjs claw:health` only as trailing observability after replayable runner evidence, not as the leading proof surface.
measurement: Before the ratchet, `node CLAW/scripts/verify-systems-optimizer.mjs` accepted runner-stability cards whose `evidence_commands` could lead with `node CLAW/scripts/run-site-script.mjs claw:health` before any replayable runner script, so passive observability could front-run the actual closed-fail recovery evidence. After the ratchet, the verifier rejects any runner-stability card that places `claw:health` ahead of replayable runner evidence, while the fixed scope-local promotion bundle stays green.
keep_rule: Keep only if runner-stability cards can use `claw:health` only after at least one replayable runner script command and the fixed scope-local evaluation bundle passes without touching route implementation paths.
learning_item: Runner-stability observability must trail replayable runner evidence; `claw:health` can summarize recovery state but cannot lead the proof surface.
